title: Precision/Recall Tradeoff for K Selection
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: Token Efficiency
description: Interactive MicroSim for justifying a K choice in RAG retrieval based on precision, recall, and per-query cost.

learningObjectives: Justify a choice of K based on precision, recall, and per-query cost.
prerequisites: Chapter 15: precision, recall, top-K retrieval, rerankers

keyQuestions: Which K satisfies recall >= 0.85 AND cost <= $0.005?
Why does the reranker widen the band?
When does the band disappear entirely?
commonMisconceptions: Precision and recall are independent of cost
